name: Khách sạn Orange Trung tâm Thành phố Đà Nẵng - Gần Chợ Hàn & Cầu Rồng (Orange City Center Hotel Da Nang - Near Han Market & Dragon Brigde)
address: 29 Hoang Dieu, Phuoc Ninh, Hai Chau, Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam
description:
Khám Phá Khách Sạn Orange - Trải Nghiệm Tiện Nghi Tại Trung Tâm Đà Nẵng

Nằm ngay trung tâm thành phố Đà Nẵng, Khách sạn Orange mang đến cho du khách trải nghiệm lưu trú tiện nghi và thoải mái chỉ cách trung tâm thành phố chưa đầy 0,5 km. Với thời gian di chuyển đến sân bay chỉ khoảng 5 phút, khách hàng dễ dàng kết nối và khám phá các điểm tham quan nổi bật của thành phố xinh đẹp này. Khách sạn được xây dựng từ năm 2013, đã có nhiều năm phục vụ du khách với dịch vụ chất lượng cao cùng không gian ấm cúng, thân thiện.

Với tổng cộng 42 phòng nghỉ hiện đại, Khách sạn Orange cam kết mang đến sự tiện nghi tối đa cho khách lưu trú. Thời gian nhận phòng bắt đầu từ 14:00 và trả phòng đến 12:00 trưa hôm sau, phù hợp cho các chuyến đi công tác hoặc du lịch dài ngày. Đặc biệt, khách sạn còn có chính sách thân thiện với gia đình, cho phép trẻ em từ 2 đến 5 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí, giúp các gia đình có thể tiết kiệm hơn trong chuyến hành trình của mình.

Tiện Nghi Giải Trí Đẳng Cấp Tại Khách sạn Orange Đà Nẵng

Khách sạn Orange tự hào mang đến cho khách lưu trú những trải nghiệm giải trí đẳng cấp và thư giãn tuyệt vời. Quý khách có thể thư giãn tại quầy bar sang trọng, nơi phục vụ các loại đồ uống đa dạng và sáng tạo, lý tưởng để thưởng thức sau một ngày khám phá thành phố năng động. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn cung cấp dịch vụ massage và spa chuyên nghiệp, giúp bạn xua tan mệt mỏi, lấy lại năng lượng để tiếp tục hành trình khám phá Đà Nẵng.

Tiện Nghi Tiện Lợi Tại Khách Sạn Orange Đà Nẵng

Khách sạn Orange Đà Nẵng mang đến cho khách lưu trú những tiện ích đa dạng và tiện lợi để chuyến đi của bạn thêm phần thoải mái. Với dịch vụ giặt ủi và giặt khô, bạn có thể dễ dàng duy trì trang phục sạch sẽ mà không cần lo lắng về thời gian hay công sức. Dịch vụ phòng 24/7 đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu ăn uống và thư giãn ngay tại phòng, mang lại sự tiện nghi tối đa cho khách. Để đảm bảo an toàn, khách có thể sử dụng két an toàn trong phòng, trong khi đội ngũ nhân viên hỗ trợ concierge luôn sẵn sàng giúp đỡ bạn với các yêu cầu đặc biệt hoặc hướng dẫn du lịch.

Khách sạn còn cung cấp Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng và khu vực công cộng, giúp bạn dễ dàng kết nối và chia sẻ khoảnh khắc du lịch. Các dịch vụ như lưu trữ hành lý, dọn phòng hàng ngày và dịch vụ giữ hành lý giúp bạn cảm thấy thoải mái và không lo lắng về hành lý của mình. Ngoài ra, khu vực hút thuốc riêng biệt và dịch vụ dọn dẹp hàng ngày đảm bảo môi trường sạch sẽ, thoáng đãng để bạn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ trọn vẹn tại Đà Nẵng.

Tiện Nghi Giao Thông Đẳng Cấp Tại Khách sạn Orange Đà Nẵng

Khách sạn Orange Đà Nẵng mang đến cho khách lưu trú những tiện ích vận chuyển đa dạng và tiện lợi để giúp chuyến đi của bạn trở nên dễ dàng hơn. Với dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay chuyên nghiệp, khách có thể yên tâm về việc di chuyển từ sân bay đến khách sạn một cách nhanh chóng và an toàn. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn cung cấp các tour du lịch hấp dẫn, giúp bạn khám phá thành phố Đà Nẵng và các địa điểm nổi bật xung quanh một cách thuận tiện nhất.

Khách sạn còn có chỗ đậu xe rộng rãi, miễn phí và ngay trong khuôn viên, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho khách tự lái xe hoặc thuê xe tại chỗ. Dịch vụ xe đưa đón miễn phí hoặc thuê xe riêng theo yêu cầu, cùng với dịch vụ taxi và bán vé tour, giúp khách dễ dàng di chuyển và tham quan mọi nơi. Với các tiện ích này, Khách sạn Orange không chỉ là nơi nghỉ dưỡng lý tưởng mà còn là trung tâm giao thông thuận tiện, phục vụ mọi nhu cầu di chuyển của khách hàng một cách linh hoạt và tiện nghi.

Tiện Nghi Phòng Nghỉ Tối Ưu Tại Khách sạn Orange Đà Nẵng

Khách sạn Orange mang đến cho quý khách trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng thoải mái với các tiện nghi hiện đại trong phòng. Mỗi phòng đều được trang bị điều hòa không khí giúp duy trì nhiệt độ lý tưởng, cùng với rèm cản sáng mang lại không gian yên tĩnh, dễ chịu để nghỉ ngơi sau ngày dài khám phá thành phố. Bạn còn có thể thư giãn bên chiếc tivi truyền hình vệ tinh hoặc cáp, thưởng thức đồ uống từ minibar hoặc tủ lạnh nhỏ gọn, đồng thời tận hưởng sự tiện lợi của các dụng cụ vệ sinh cá nhân, dầu gội, sữa tắm cao cấp và khăn tắm mềm mại.

Ngoài ra, các phòng còn có ban công hoặc sân thượng, nơi bạn có thể ngắm nhìn cảnh quan xung quanh hoặc thưởng thức không khí trong lành. Để tăng thêm sự tiện nghi, khách còn được cung cấp nước đóng chai miễn phí, cà phê hòa tan và trà miễn phí mỗi ngày, cùng với máy sấy tóc, đồ dùng vệ sinh cá nhân và bộ đồ ngủ bathrobe cao cấp, giúp bạn cảm thấy như đang ở nhà trong mỗi chuyến đi của mình.

Tiện Nghi Ẩm Thực Tại Khách Sạn Orange Đà Nẵng

Khách sạn Orange tự hào mang đến cho khách hàng trải nghiệm ẩm thực đa dạng và phong phú ngay trong khuôn viên của mình. Thư giãn cùng tách cà phê thơm ngon tại quầy bar, hoặc thưởng thức các món ăn đặc sắc tại nhà hàng trong không gian ấm cúng và thân thiện. Đặc biệt, dịch vụ phòng 24/7 giúp quý khách dễ dàng thưởng thức các món ăn yêu thích ngay tại phòng nghỉ, mang lại sự tiện lợi tối đa trong hành trình của mình.

Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có các tiện nghi BBQ hiện đại dành cho những buổi tiệc ngoài trời đầy sôi động, cùng với nhà hàng Halal đảm bảo phục vụ các món ăn phù hợp với nhu cầu của khách hàng theo đạo Hồi. Dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày giúp duy trì sự sạch sẽ và thoải mái cho không gian nghỉ dưỡng của bạn. Với sự kết hợp hoàn hảo giữa các tiện ích ẩm thực, Khách sạn Orange cam kết mang đến cho bạn trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời và đáng nhớ trong suốt kỳ nghỉ tại Đà Nẵng.

Các loại phòng đa dạng tại Khách sạn Orange Đà Nẵng

Khách sạn Orange tự hào mang đến một loạt các lựa chọn phòng đa dạng phù hợp với mọi nhu cầu của khách hàng. Bạn có thể lựa chọn Super Deluxe Room với view thành phố, rộng 30 mét vuông, trang bị một giường đôi êm ái để tận hưởng không gian thoải mái và ngắm nhìn cảnh sắc sôi động của Đà Nẵng. Ngoài ra, các phòng Superior Twin cũng rộng 30 mét vuông, phù hợp cho nhóm bạn hoặc gia đình nhỏ với hai giường đơn tiện nghi.

Chúng tôi còn cung cấp các loại phòng Deluxe Double và Deluxe Twin, đều rộng 25 mét vuông, mang đến sự tiện nghi tối đa cho khách lưu trú. Đối với những khách muốn trải nghiệm không gian sang trọng hơn, các phòng Suite Double và Suite Twin đều rộng 30 mét vuông, phù hợp cho các cặp đôi hoặc nhóm nhỏ muốn có không gian riêng tư và thoải mái. Gia đình lớn hoặc nhóm đông có thể chọn phòng Family rộng đến 50 mét vuông, hoặc phòng Executive rộng 50 mét vuông với giường King lớn, đảm bảo mọi nhu cầu đều được đáp ứng.

Đặt phòng qua Agoda không chỉ giúp bạn dễ dàng lựa chọn và xác nhận phòng nhanh chóng mà còn đảm bảo bạn nhận được mức giá tốt nhất trên thị trường. Hệ thống đặt phòng của chúng tôi mang lại trải nghiệm đơn giản, thuận tiện và không gây phiền hà, giúp bạn yên tâm chuẩn bị cho kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Đà Nẵng.

Khám Phá Vùng Đất Hải Châu - Trung Tâm Sôi Động Của Đà Nẵng

Hải Châu là trung tâm hành chính, thương mại và giải trí của thành phố Đà Nẵng, nơi hội tụ của nhịp sống năng động và hiện đại. Khu vực này nổi bật với những tòa nhà cao tầng, trung tâm thương mại sầm uất, nhà hàng đa dạng và quán cà phê phong cách. Du khách có thể dễ dàng thưởng thức các món ngon đặc sản địa phương, thưởng thức không khí sôi động của các chợ đêm và mua sắm tại các trung tâm thương mại lớn như Vincom Plaza hay Lotte Mart. Hải Châu còn là điểm xuất phát lý tưởng để khám phá các địa danh nổi tiếng khác của thành phố như sông Hàn, Cầu Rồng hay Bảo tàng Chăm, mang đến trải nghiệm đa dạng và hấp dẫn cho mọi du khách.

Hướng Dẫn Di Chuyển Từ Sân Bay Đà Nẵng Đến Khách Sạn Orange

Từ sân bay quốc tế Đà Nẵng, du khách chỉ mất khoảng 10-15 phút lái xe để đến Khách sạn Orange, nằm tại trung tâm quận Hải Châu sôi động. Khi rời khỏi sân bay, bạn có thể chọn dịch vụ taxi chính thức hoặc sử dụng các ứng dụng gọi xe như Grab để có chuyến đi thuận tiện và an toàn. Các phương tiện này đều cung cấp dịch vụ nhanh chóng, giá cả hợp lý và giúp bạn dễ dàng theo dõi lộ trình đến khách sạn của mình.

Ngoài ra, nếu bạn muốn trải nghiệm phương tiện công cộng, có thể bắt xe buýt từ sân bay đến trung tâm thành phố, sau đó đi bộ hoặc gọi xe đến Khách sạn Orange. Tuy nhiên, phương án này phù hợp hơn nếu bạn mang theo nhiều hành lý hoặc muốn tiết kiệm chi phí. Dù chọn phương thức nào, hành trình từ sân bay đến khách sạn sẽ mang lại cảm giác thoải mái, giúp bạn bắt đầu kỳ nghỉ tại Đà Nẵng một cách dễ dàng và thuận tiện.

Khám Phá Các Địa Danh Nổi bật Gần Khách sạn Orange tại Đà Nẵng

Chỉ cách Khách sạn Orange không xa, du khách có thể khám phá nhiều di tích lịch sử và điểm tham quan hấp dẫn của Đà Nẵng. Bảo tàng Điêu khắc Chăm nổi bật với bộ sưu tập nghệ thuật Chăm cổ kính và tinh xảo, mang đến trải nghiệm văn hóa đặc sắc của khu vực miền Trung Việt Nam. Nhà thờ chính tòa Đà Nẵng với kiến trúc Gothic độc đáo là điểm đến lý tưởng để chiêm ngưỡng vẻ đẹp kiến trúc tôn giáo cổ kính giữa lòng thành phố.

Ngoài ra, du khách còn có thể dạo chơi trên Cầu sông Hàn nổi tiếng, nơi thường diễn ra các lễ hội và hoạt động văn hóa sôi động. Đối với những ai yêu thích giải trí, Sunworld Đà Nẵng Wonder và Vòng quay Mặt Trời Sun Wheel mang đến những trải nghiệm vui nhộn và tầm nhìn toàn cảnh thành phố từ trên cao. Bãi biển Xuân Thiều gần đó là nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn, tắm biển hoặc thưởng thức hải sản tươi ngon. Những điểm đến này chắc chắn sẽ làm phong phú thêm hành trình khám phá của bạn khi lưu trú tại Khách sạn Orange.

Giao Thông Công Cộng Tiện Lợi Gần Khách Sạn Orange

Khách sạn Orange nằm gần ga Đà Nẵng, một trong những trung tâm vận chuyển chính của thành phố, mang đến sự thuận tiện tối đa cho du khách. Từ đây, bạn dễ dàng di chuyển đến các điểm du lịch nổi bật của Đà Nẵng cũng như các tỉnh lân cận bằng các tuyến tàu và xe lửa. Việc tiếp cận các phương tiện giao thông công cộng tại ga Đà Nẵng giúp bạn tiết kiệm thời gian và chi phí cho hành trình khám phá thành phố năng động này.

Hệ thống giao thông tại ga Đà Nẵng rất phát triển, cung cấp các dịch vụ vận chuyển đa dạng như tàu lửa, xe bus và các phương tiện liên kết khác. Điều này mang lại sự linh hoạt và tiện lợi cho khách lưu trú tại khách sạn Orange, giúp bạn dễ dàng di chuyển đến các địa điểm nổi bật như bãi biển Mỹ Khê, cầu Rồng hay trung tâm thương mại. Với vị trí chiến lược gần ga Đà Nẵng, khách hàng của khách sạn có thể yên tâm về khả năng di chuyển nhanh chóng và thuận tiện trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Các nhà hàng xung quanh Khách sạn Orange

Khu vực quanh Khách sạn Orange tại Đà Nẵng là thiên đường ẩm thực với đa dạng lựa chọn phong phú. Du khách có thể thưởng thức pizza ngon tại Pizza 4P's Hoang Van Thu hoặc trải nghiệm hương vị truyền thống Việt Nam tại Tre Viet Cuisine. Nếu yêu thích bánh mì và mì, Bánh mì - Mì AA - Happy Bread là điểm đến lý tưởng để thưởng thức các món ăn nhanh, ngon miệng. Đối với các món Âu sang trọng, Olivia's Prime Steakhouse và Limoncello Danang mang đến những bữa ăn đẳng cấp bên cạnh không gian ấm cúng. Những ai yêu thích steak có thể ghé Red Sky Steakhouse, còn những thực khách muốn khám phá hương vị đặc trưng của Huế thì không thể bỏ qua Hue Ngon Restaurant. Ngoài ra, Memory Lounge và LUK LAK Restaurant cũng là những địa điểm lý tưởng để thưởng thức đồ uống và các món ăn đặc sắc khác trong khu vực.

Các địa điểm mua sắm gần Khách sạn Orange

Khách sạn Orange nằm trong khu vực thuận tiện để khám phá các trung tâm mua sắm và cửa hàng đặc sắc tại Đà Nẵng. Bạn có thể dễ dàng ghé thăm Trung tâm Thương mại Indochina Riverside để tìm kiếm các mặt hàng thời trang, điện tử và quà lưu niệm đa dạng. Đối diện hoặc gần đó còn có Cửa hàng Kitsch và Cửa hàng Thy Nga, nơi bạn có thể mua sắm các sản phẩm thủ công mỹ nghệ, đồ trang trí độc đáo. Đối với những ai yêu thích thời trang, Nhà may Byfas và Nhà may Paul Bespoke Tailoring mang đến các dịch vụ may đo cao cấp, phù hợp cho những bộ trang phục đặc biệt. Ngoài ra, Chợ phiên Đà Nẵng là nơi lý tưởng để trải nghiệm không khí sôi động cùng các mặt hàng thủ công, đặc sản địa phương và quà lưu niệm độc đáo. Đừng quên thưởng thức các loại bánh và đồ ngọt tại Pheva Chocolate hoặc ghé thăm Café & đồ lưu niệm Đà Nẵng để thư giãn và mua sắm những món quà lưu niệm ý nghĩa cho người thân.

Giá Phòng Tại Khách sạn Orange - Cạnh Tranh và Phù Hợp Với Ngân Sách

Khách sạn Orange tại Đà Nẵng mang đến trải nghiệm lưu trú tuyệt vời với mức giá phòng trung bình từ 26 đến 50 USD, phù hợp với nhiều du khách muốn khám phá thành phố biển này mà không cần phải chi tiêu quá nhiều. Với mức giá cạnh tranh, khách hàng có thể tận hưởng các tiện ích chất lượng cao và dịch vụ thân thiện trong một không gian thoải mái, ấm cúng. Đây là lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những du khách muốn tiết kiệm mà vẫn có trải nghiệm tốt khi đến Đà Nẵng.

Trong khi đó, giá phòng trung bình ở các khách sạn khác trong thành phố dao động từ 51 đến 75 USD, cao hơn đáng kể so với Khách sạn Orange. Điều này làm cho Orange trở thành một điểm đến hấp dẫn đối với những ai tìm kiếm sự cân bằng giữa giá cả hợp lý và chất lượng dịch vụ. Với mức giá phải chăng này, bạn có thể dễ dàng tận hưởng các dịch vụ tiện nghi, vị trí thuận lợi và trải nghiệm đáng nhớ tại trung tâm thành phố Đà Nẵng mà không lo về chi phí.

Nhận Xét Tích Cực Về Khách Sạn Orange Đà Nẵng

Khách sạn Orange được đánh giá cao nhờ đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện, nhiệt tình và luôn sẵn sàng hỗ trợ khách hàng. Đội ngũ nhân viên không chỉ thân thiện mà còn rất lịch sự, hiệu quả, tạo cảm giác chào đón và thoải mái cho mọi du khách. Thức ăn sáng tại nhà hàng của khách sạn cũng nhận được nhiều lời khen ngợi, với các món ăn được chế biến theo yêu cầu và rất ngon miệng, mang lại trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời cho khách lưu trú.

Phòng ở của khách sạn được mô tả là đẹp, sạch sẽ, hiện đại và rất thoải mái, mang lại cảm giác dễ chịu sau một ngày dài khám phá thành phố. Vị trí của khách sạn thuận tiện, giúp khách dễ dàng di chuyển đến các điểm tham quan nổi bật của Đà Nẵng. Tổng thể, khách hàng luôn có những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời và hài lòng về dịch vụ cũng như không gian của khách sạn Orange, khiến họ muốn quay lại nhiều lần nữa.

Đánh giá tích cực về Khách sạn Orange tại Đà Nẵng

Khách sạn Orange tại Đà Nẵng nhận được nhiều phản hồi tích cực từ khách hàng về trải nghiệm tổng thể. Với điểm số trung bình 8.1, khách lưu trú đánh giá cao chất lượng dịch vụ và sự thoải mái mà khách sạn mang lại. Vị trí của khách sạn cũng là một điểm cộng lớn, giúp khách dễ dàng khám phá các điểm tham quan nổi bật trong thành phố. Không những thế, giá trị mà khách sạn mang lại còn rất hợp lý, phù hợp với ngân sách của đa số du khách, mang lại cảm giác hài lòng về khoản đầu tư của mình.

Các tiện nghi tại khách sạn cũng nhận được sự đánh giá tích cực, với các dịch vụ được duy trì ở mức độ tốt, đảm bảo sự tiện lợi và thoải mái cho khách. Đặc biệt, đội ngũ nhân viên của khách sạn thể hiện sự chuyên nghiệp và thân thiện, luôn sẵn sàng hỗ trợ để mang lại trải nghiệm tốt nhất. Với các yếu tố như vệ sinh sạch sẽ, thực phẩm ngon miệng và dịch vụ khách hàng tận tâm, Khách sạn Orange là lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những ai muốn có một kỳ nghỉ thoải mái, tiện nghi tại thành phố Đà Nẵng.

sample_comments.title: Scam
sample_comments.text: I book in agoda and its non refundable. When I arrived at the hotel one staff show me his phone and said no room available. Second reason no electricity and water so its life threatening to admit a guest. Its a scam. My advice do not come or book this hotel. Even you have it booked online but when you arrived the stuff of the hotel can not give you rooms for this reasons they gave. Its a total waste of money, time and effort.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text: Definitely dont recommend staying at this hotel, it is not a safe environment, staff are not friendly and very very bad for boutique hotel standards and not hygienic. Also room doesn't look like the picture. You can stay in better places for the same prices or by paying a little more. I couldn't sleep all night, unfortunately I don't think there was housekeeping and there were dirty stuff from previous people. There was a lot of rubbish on the stairs and corridor.

sample_comments.title: Bad Bad
sample_comments.text: Scamming Hotel, we arrived late at night. There was no receptionist to be found at the hotel lobby. We sat down for 10 mins, then a dodgy guy with bike helmet showed up and asked if we wanted room. We told him that we had already booked through Agoda and showed him the booking. He told us to wait and he would be looking for the receptionist. 20 mins later the supposed receptionist showed up and asked us to pay first and then we obliged. Only then he told us we would need to go to their "second branch". Then told us to hopped on bikes with our luggages. Then drove us to another hotel called "Louis Hotel." Then he led us into a room but we complained that we booked 2 rooms instead of one. And we had to show him the booking again. He said he couldn't get us 2 rooms. Then finally we decided enough is enough and asked for money back. Only then we got 2 rooms but the rooms are not in good shapes, toilets have no lights and cant flush. AC's not working properly. Rooms are nasty and smelly with molds. Worst experience ever.

sample_comments.title: Worst hotel ever
sample_comments.text: Worst hotel ever

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text: Since I arrived late, I was looking for a hotel just to sleep in. It was a classic case of "you get what you pay for." I'm used to budget accommodations and wasn't expecting service on par with Japanese hotels at all, but this place was still terrible. The door to the room didn't fit properly, the bathroom door had a broken lock, there was only one bottle of water for two people, no tissues, and despite it saying breakfast was included, I was told it wasn't being provided. The elevator was shaky and scary, and when I asked to pay with a card, I was clearly met with a displeased expression... I was disappointed because it was cheap, the pictures looked nice, and the reviews were good. I just accepted that I was there to sleep and spent the night.

1- Not clean, moldy, and dusty, the one-way street is very inconvenient. 
2- The staff is not enthusiastic, seems to ask for more money when the room is empty... but if guests want to check in 30 minutes or 1 hour early, they have to pay extra.

5- The air conditioner emits an unpleasant odor (unable to adjust the temperature) and it's very hot... 
6- In general.. really..one should not stop and rest at this place.

sample_comments.title: Hotel location & facility
sample_comments.text: Hotel location was not near to the location as described in Agoda many location need to take grab, the TV was not functioning and some basic item like mineral water was not provided. The hotel cleanliness was moderate only.

sample_comments.title: Massive disappointment
sample_comments.text: Aged furniture, dirty floor, housekeeping who never cleaned the toilet and staff who left the feeling that they are being forced to do their job

sample_comments.title: KS needs to improve.
sample_comments.text: The hotel room is beautiful, the facilities are good, and the price is cheap; however, the carpet in the bathroom was not clean, and when booking the hotel, it was confirmed that breakfast was included, but in reality, it was not served, which is not good and needs to be communicated to guests. There was no Wi-Fi password information in the room, and when checking in at 6 PM, the hallway lights were not on. The staff initially provided the wrong room according to the booking but later changed it to the correct one.

sample_comments.title: Not impressed
sample_comments.text:
We were not impressed with the Orange Hotel after staying at other hotels in Vietnam. The staff were definitely attentive, a little too much in that while we were trying to eat breakfast they would come over many times to start up conversations. We were upgraded without being told the first night then they needed to move us the second night, which was confusing. They do have a sister hotel in Hoi An which was helpful because we could use that as a point of reference. The Hoi An hotel set us up with a shuttle transfer that was cheap and quick back to Da Nang, but we're not sure why the Orange Hotel didn't know about it. Breakfast was okay, but the fried foods were always cold. The Vietnamese sandwiches were a favorite. 

I guess we mostly weren't impressed with Da Nang and would only recommed it as a place to travel through from the airport to Hoi An.

sample_comments.title: Read this
sample_comments.text: On arrival at 6.30pm we were told due to electric problems we had no room! Others have had this if you read other reviews . However, there was a room arranged '400m ' away. 2 trips on a motorbike to get us and bags there. We were taken to the worst hotel ever. We refused to stay there because shower had leaked across the floor, cigarette in the toilet, moisture running down the walls, dead cockroach, beds had been slept in. As we came out of the lift at ground floor 2 rats were going up the stairs. This 'hotel' has been closed since 2022 and now rents rooms by the hour so I leave you to decide what goes on there! After a 2 hour debate we were moved to another hotel 13km away! For one night only then in the morning got a taxi to the orange hotel ...which was ok. When we rejected the disgusting hotel, all we were offered was a refund. No good at 8.30pm!...avoid orange hotel in case you get sent elsewhere and waste a whole evening and the next morning ending up know here near where you planned to be! A total nightmare!

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: Inexpensive, but not very clean. Needs updating maybe some paint. Halways dirty, room floor not clean. Bathtub had mold around. Tv not working. I asked for another room, he gave me another, it was a little better but tv had no remote control

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: When I arrived, there were still "short hair strands" from previous guests on the toilet that had not been cleaned. The room did not have a kettle and the refrigerator was no longer working. The hotel's location is on a road under construction, making it quite dusty and difficult to find a place to park the car. For one night, it was acceptable given the room rate.

sample_comments.title: The policy is very customer unfriendly
sample_comments.text:
This hotel is very customer unfriendly. I booked the hotel room for two nights but later I found that I made a mistake on my flight departure date and I only need one night. I contacted Agoda immediately (one week before my check in date) to explain but agoda told me twice that Orange hotel refused to help me. I understand that this is their policy but they could at least try to help me rent the room to someone else since it was one week before my check in date.

After I arrived, I tried to explain and negotiate. The manager, said he can't change the policy and while I requested to talk to their boss, the boss never show up. Later, the lady at the front desk tried to contact Agoda and said that the problem is that Agoda may still charge Orange commission if Orange refund me. But their manager, came to stop her and started to yell at me and chanllenge me.

I understand that I made a careless mistake on booking initially. However, this hotel is very cold and customer unfriendly during the whole process. I would not recommend anyone to choose this hotel.

sample_comments.title: I will tell me story and let others judge
sample_comments.text:
- I saw the post of Orange Hotel with the 8.4. it's price ~ 1.6 mil VND, discounted price was abt 500k VND, I booked and got ~ 1mil VND for 2 nights.
- when I got there, the receptionist greeted me with a unpleasant face, talking on phone with someone. I waited, and he talked to me after the call "this hotel is in power cut, we cannot let the guests to use elevator, hence you will not able to bring your luggages upstair + the street in front of our hotel is been fixing now, too noisy. May I send you to another hotel in the chain?" I know that they have another Orange hotel at another street, hence I agreed to move there
After I saw the name of the hotel to move, it's not Orange, but Louis Hotel, I asked the receptionist "why it's not Orange, if your hotel cannot provide me a room, why did you still receive my booking? why did not you tell me in advance but wait for me to come here then treat me this way?", he explained blah blah. I checked the price of that Louis hotel to see whether it's the same level with this Orange, as I would not accept to move to a worse one, but couldn't find the info, so I decided to move there to settle first, then maybe would look for another hotel. ah, he helped me to call a cab, and I had to pay the fee. it was not much, but they asked me to move there, it's not me to ask them to move me there, why did I have to take care the transportation fee? 
- When I reached there, I saw immediately the board to show the price of a room in that hotel, 350kVND only. I asked the receptionist of Louis, and he told me that I would collect ~1 mil VND from me, same as my booking info. I asked for the real price, he told me it cost 500kVND normally. What does it mean? the normal price, without discount, is only 500k vs. 1.6 mil VND of Orange, are these 2 hotels in the same level? the receptionist at Loius hotel seeing my anger, and talked to Orange hotel receptionist, and offer me a rate @400kVND/night
- I tried to look for another hotel to move but some hotels around was full or not having good reviews, hence I decided to stay there. but after, I could not stand the smell of the bathroom, hence, I stayed there 1 night then moved to another one near the beach, it was much much better.
It's quite a long story abt my issue with Orange hotel. Honestly, I cannot judge about their facilities or other services as I did not stay there, did not know what exactly how it looked like, that's why I just keep it at 3 in my review. But the way they arranged my accommodation made me feel bad. It's up to you to decide whether you would choose Orange hotel as a venue of your trip.

sample_comments.title: Okayish stay, staff was polite, worn out/ old condition
sample_comments.text: Staff was nicely spoken, very polite and cute. Rooms were kind worn out and old condition bathrooms and rooms. There were little red ants all over the bed, windows table (idk it's kinda common in that area) . But location is so-so. Can get better near the airport accommodations or near my khe beach is best bet for other days. Can get better more modern more amenities properties at same or lesser price.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: Booked a room with 2 beds, but received a small room with 1 bed, and there were many cockroaches in the room. The room was a bit dark and damp. Not worth the price paid, but the central location makes it easy to move around.

sample_comments.title: Do yourself a favor... skip it
sample_comments.text: We arrived late at night and requested a non-smoking room but upon entering, the room lingers the strong smell of cigarette. We though it just because we are near the fire exit and it will definitely fade away but it wasn't. The next night, the key on our door isn't working, even the maintenance have a hard time opening our door using the duplicate key. The moment the he opened it he just went away with hand signals thinking that he will came back but didn't. We only stayed for two nights and during the day we are on our tour, only arrived during late night so we are already exhausted on our trip. Comfortable and no hassle hotel room, it is the only thing that we are looking for but they failed big time on that.

sample_comments.title: Room is too small for price paid.

There are no breakfasts. The description lies to you. The restaurant in here is closed for years.

Wifi is stable but it is only 10 Mbps.

On the second day I was told that the bottler water that is supposed to be renewed every day wasn't in the price.

sample_comments.title: Night staff are clueless sorry
sample_comments.text: Stay was fine. Night staff didn't respond to an issue with another guest going crazy in his room. I went down to let him know he didn't care and didn't even listen lol. Front desk staff in the morning and daytime were really friendly and welcoming.

sample_comments.title: Good staff terrible rooms
sample_comments.text: The only good thing about this hotel was its staff and the artisan beer in their lobby fridge. It was cheap so I cannot expect much but dear lord the room was awful and so dirty I felt disgusted honestly, nothing like their photos. Location it's okay but there are works on the street.

sample_comments.title: Hard to enter
sample_comments.text: There's a construction going on the entire street that's why it's hard to enter the building. You have to go to a muddy path (if it rains) before entering. The bed and towels were also dirty and the AC was very noisy. You can also hear the people outside since that walls are very thin. The room was spacious tho' and the staff was friendly.

sample_comments.title: All fried stuff for breakfast
sample_comments.text:
Hotel is old, but clean and friendly staff.
Location is not convenient enough for travellers to walk around but grab is easy.
Breakfast is nightmare for us because all food are fried, very unhealthy and they provide only beef noodles apart from the fries stuffs.
If you want a good breakfast to start the day, you might want to look for somewhere else.
sample_comments.response:

sample_comments.title: Value and decent hotel stah
sample_comments.text: The best impression I have is that the staff are really helpful. They gave tips on travelling in Da Nang, the local food to try etc. Appreciate on those useful tips to get us oriented in these few days in Da Nang. It suits more for travellers who out most of the time from the hotel as the facilities are very basic - no gym and pool but I feel the price is still value for money to stay. Keep it up!

sample_comments.title: a brief stop

sample_comments.title: Great staff
sample_comments.text:
Nice, new-ish hotel with very friendly and helpful staff. On the first morning I decided to sleep in and miss breakfast, which finishes at 9:30. At 9:40 the restaurant telephoned asking if I would like breakfast brought to my room. I asked for a fruit plate and coffee, which was delivered to my room at no extra cost!

On the 9th floor, where I stayed, you can hear breakfast being served on 10th floor, so I'd recommend staying on a lower floor. My double bedroom was clearly designed as a twin, with sockets and light switches in the middle of the wall, and so the double bed was pushed up towards the window. It was a little odd visually, but a very comfortable room. I'd definitely consider staying here again.

sample_comments.title: Wonderful staff
sample_comments.text: My friend and I stayed at this hotel for only one night, but all the staff members there were really friendly and kind. They were always happy to help us. Actually, I felt their hospitality is much better than the 4 star hotel we stayed in Hoi An. The room was a bit small but still had enough space to open out suitcase. Furthermore, they upgraded our room for free! :) I do not usually write feedback on hotels, but this hotel was very comfortable that I couldn't resist writing about it. No wonder why it has such a good review. Thank you very much again to all the staff members who made the stay in Da Nang fun! :)

sample_comments.title: Nice small hotel in Danang

sample_comments.title: Great location and staff was friendly and helpful
sample_comments.text: We stayed one night in July 2016. The staff was great because they were waiting for us and check in was fast. This is unlike other hotels who need to waste a lot of time looking for your reservation. They also provide a welcome drink and complimentary beer in the room. It is hard to say something bad about the Orange Hotel so just stay there and you'll see.

sample_comments.title: hotel staffs
sample_comments.text: Very friendly staff and english spoken no problem communication.

sample_comments.title: Friendly Staff and Good Location
sample_comments.text: booked the standard room with no window, get upgraded with additional 5 dollars. Staff here are very friendly and willing to help. They gave gifts to some customers for some reason but we did not get one.

sample_comments.title: It is good for a short stay because staff good
sample_comments.text: relax and comfortable

sample_comments.title: Comfortable stay
sample_comments.positives: Courteous staff, good location and comfortable rooms

sample_comments.title: picked on staff performance alone, did not disappo
sample_comments.text:
What everyone said before me is 100% correct. From the moment you step foot onto the pavement in front of the hotel you are greeted and welcomed like you are part of the hotel family - this is obviously part of the hotel's ethos. 

The room standard was second to none, beds comfortable and air-con working great (this is a big deal in South East Asia!!!). Great range at breakfast although both days the plates weren't really stocked up even at a reasonable time which is perhaps something the hotel can fix.

The front desk manager was extremely helpful in recommending places of interests and also for a friendly chat which adds to the experience. Also had the privilege of meeting Mr. Nam who was the hotel owner and to no surprise he also was completely curteuous and very warm to greet.

Overall, a highly recommended hotel if it is in your price range (as there are other lesser hotels - only just - for a big step down in price).
sample_comments.positives: warm hospitality, staff knowledge and comfort of room & hotel in general

sample_comments.title: Cozy hotel with friendly and helpful staff
sample_comments.text: The experience was a great surprise to me! Although I stayed in a standard room without window, I still found it cozy. First, they offered 2 bottles of complimentary beer everyday which is a very nice treat in this hot weather! Second, the staff was very enthusiastic, helpful and friendly. They are very willing to show us the great places and nice restaurants. Because of this, we went to a very local seafood restaurant and had a great meal! Third, the manager of hotel was super friendly to his customers. He sat down and talked with the room guests every morning during the breakfast! I was very impressed and knew more about Vietnam via the conversation! If I come to Da Nang again, definitely I'll come again and I highly recommend orange hotel!
sample_comments.positives: Great location, Nice and helpful staff, free complimentary beer everyday

sample_comments.title: Simple, clean and excellent staff services
sample_comments.text: Have a great stay in the hotel and enjoy the city, thanks to the staff recommendation.
sample_comments.positives: The 3 great things about this hotel are Great breakfast, free wifi and excellent staff. Special thanks to cam, xoan, nga, vi and mimi nguyen

sample_comments.title: New hotel, very attentive staff
sample_comments.text: We stayed here for one night so did not see much of Danang. The staff recommended seeing the Dragon bridge at 9 pm so we walked down and purchased tickets for a boat ride which went under three beautifully lighted bridges and stopped in front of the dragon bridge. At 9 PM fire came from its mouth and then bursts of water to drown the sparks. Quite the spectacle and happy we did not miss it! Walking back to our hotel was a little scary as not much was open. If I had been alone, would have grabbed a cab. All in all, a great stay but too short to give much of a review. The breakfast was a la cart but would have been better if they offered a pork or beef Pho and fruite, coffee, juices, bread rolls or pastries and cheeses. Quicker and would have been enough.

sample_comments.title: Great & Friendly Service
sample_comments.text:
From the moment of arrival at the Hotel, you felt that this is a very different hotel from the rest. The bellhop was at the side of our taxi eagerly waiting to help you unliaded. Were greeted by a friendly staff of receptionists and GRO, coupled with hot towel and cups of tea to smoothen the processing if the check in. Breakfast was good considering what other hotel in the region would offer. If you are out of idea what to see where to go, just talk to the ever friendly GRO, she will be able to offer you some great tips.

On departure, the owner would be present to bade you farewell making the entire stay in Orange Hotel the best ever in my visits to DaNang
sample_comments.positives: Very Friendly, Personalize and Fantastic Service

sample_comments.title: Excellent Customer Service
sample_comments.text: Customer service is the name of the game here - the staff were all delightful, especially the lovely girl on the front desk both days of our stay here. She helped us discover key areas of the city, booked our transportation to Hoi An with a side stop at the Lady Buddha temple, and even printed out text of how to communicate an allergy to fish in Vietnamese. The owner greeted us at breakfast and chatted with us about his interest in Canada as well - lovely man who clearly enjoys getting to know his customers. The neighbourhood is a short walk away (10 min) from the riverside bars and restaurants as well as the Dragon Bridge, making it a bit quieter at night.

sample_comments.title: Orange hotel Very satisfied
sample_comments.text: We were very happy with our 4 night stay at Orange hotel. The hotel is clean, safe, and the staff attended to our every need. The breakfast served in the morning was varied and plentiful. We had the pleasure of meeting and visiting with the owner who turned out to be a very caring and customer focused man. Again a very positive experience at the Orange Hotel. I would definitely stay there again.

sample_comments.title: Very comfortable while my staying

sample_comments.title: Good service and great value for money
sample_comments.text: We love the Orange Hotel. The hotel is nice and clean. It costs us USD 5 (or VND 150K) to go from the airport to the hotel by taxi. Staff are extremely helpful and friendly. Buffet breakfast is nice and tasty, with enough choices.
sample_comments.positives: friendly and helpful staff, centrally located, nice breakfast

sample_comments.title: Amazing staff, brand new hotel
sample_comments.text: Within a few minutes we realised this is a very special hotel, and throughout our stay we were not disappointed. The hotel is just 4 months old, and the staff were charming. Clearly very high standards were applied to the building and everything worked perfectly. This and and the staff put many much more expensive hotels to shame. The only slight quibbles we could think of was that some of the breakfast items (e.g. pancakes) would have been better served hot, also the location is in a rather non-descript area, although much of Da Nang is like that. Overall a very memorable experience, and extremely good value for money.
sample_comments.positives: The attitude, English, and knowledge of the staff

sample_comments.title: Great experience
sample_comments.text:
Wonderful hotel. The room was very nice, clean, comfortable, and felt very cozy. The hotel itself is located within a short walk from the Han River promenade, the Dragon Bridge, as well as numerous eating/drinking options. The buffet breakfast was ample and filling for this price range, and the guest relationship officer, a young lady called Thu, went around the tables making sure the guests are happy with their stay. 

As nice as the hotel was, it was the staff that made all the difference. The staff were superbly friendly and helpful and spoke English. One of them came running after me with an umbrella when she noticed it had started to drizzle. Such attention to detail and welfare of their customers is truly rare for a hotel at any price range. So impressed was I with the staff that I booked a room with their sister hotel(Nhi Nhi Hotel) in Hoi An hoping to get equally good service.

One of the best hotels in this price range I have ever stayed in any part of the world.

sample_comments.title: Ease and comfort
sample_comments.text: The staff went out of their way to be helpful both in the hotel and by providing car service to tourist sites and the airport.We loved the fruit and local wine waiting for us upon arrival. Our room with large windows and French doors leading to a spacious rooftop balcony gave us great views of DaNang. The neighborhood is safe and welcoming to foreign travelers and offers numerous coffee houses and restaurants. It is a quick walk to the river,local market, Cham Museum and Buddhist Temples.
sample_comments.positives: the staff, great breakfast choices, lovely rom

sample_comments.title: Live like a prince, pay like a backpacker.
sample_comments.text: We passed through Da Nang whilst visiting Hoi An, staying only 1 night and didn't eat at the in-house restaurant (but I'm sure it would be good, this is Vietnam after all!). The staff fell over themselves to make us comfortable - iced tea and cold hand towels at the door - helped us with flight confirmation and packing and labelling a large box full of lanterns we were taking home. As we were leaving early in the morning, they also made up a take-away breakfast for us and gave us a free airport transfer. The room itself was splendid, everything works well and the shower was fantastic - heaps of pressure and hot water. We highly recommend Orange Hotel.
sample_comments.positives: Great try-harder staff, convenient location, clean, new facilities.

sample_comments.title: Excellent value.
sample_comments.text:
A little outside the main area, but elreasonavly close. 10 minutes from Deagon Bridge. 

Very clean, housekeeping every day. 

Proper bathroom with bathtub, nice! 

TV didn't seem to work, but no issue with this. 

Large but quiet hotel. Would definitely stay here again.

What a joy it is to stay at such a wonderful place. I have stayed at hotels that cost 8 times more, but none could match Orange Hotel

sample_comments.title: Orange Hotel staff rock
sample_comments.text: Orange Hotel facilities and staff are outstanding and l have nothing but praise for all the Orange Hotel staff. Their helpfulness, assistance and genuineness was a highlight of my stay in Da Nang. As much as l would have like to given its location top points, regretfully its location is not in the centre of the tourists precedent. However it is only a few blocks from the river and very walkable or about 10000 dong by taxi after a few quite drinks. Worthwhile mentioning is the staff arrange a taxi to take me to various locations of my choice and had the driver wait for me. The approximate cost was discussed and the outcome was the drive went were l wanted without guidance and charged slightly less than anticipated thanks to the directions provided by the Orange Hotel staff. I will definitely recommend Orange Hotel to all and most definitely choose this hotel when l return on my next visit.

sample_comments.title: Best service ever!

I had stayed 2 days in this hotel, I don't feel any uncomfortables and tiny problems. Their breakfast are really good. when you are standing few minutes infront of some dishes they came to you and explained about the dishes and let you know how to eat. Staff's serives can't be better. That services is one of the best hotel service in my life. I really want to say, Appreciate every service they provide to me. I definitely stay again, when I have chance to visit Da Nang. They left awesome memories to me in Danang, Vietnam.

sample_comments.title: Wow, i love Orange hotel
sample_comments.text: The staff here is so awesome, Swan, thank you! I hope they tell you about this, you deserve it! Greeted with cold towel and drink, welcome sign in the hotel as well, they give you two free waters and beers in your rooms. Room is modern, good bed, great shower, wifi was awesome everywhere. Breakfast is up on the higher floors of the building, awesome views from here, and you can order anything on menu, they are very attentive to you and really care about your experience, cant say enough about that. They even see you to your leaving cab or van to make sure everything goes well from start to finish. I would always stay here if I am back in Da Nang. Oh yeh, airport is 10 min cab, river is 10 min walk, beach 10 min cab, lots of food and places like that walking distance.

They spoke English well and remembered your name. Breakfast for Westerners was 8/10 which is pretty good for Vietnam. Stay here and you will be impressed!

The price is reasonable for the quality. If we have the opportunity to travel again, our group will choose this hotel again.

The rooms, while simply designed, are extremely clean, tidy, and fully equipped with amenities like air conditioning, a refrigerator, a hairdryer, etc. With very reasonable prices and a very convenient location, this is definitely a worthwhile choice every time I come to Da Nang! Highly recommended!

sample_comments.title: Beautiful hotel, good staff.
sample_comments.text: The center of Da Nang, near Dragon Bridge, Han Market, Con Market, with many delicious breakfast eateries around. The room is clean, staff are welcoming, friendly, and there are good motorbikes available for rent.

sample_comments.title: Central, clean, friendly
sample_comments.text: Hotel in the center, near the airport, near the Dragon Bridge, Han River, Han Market, convenient for sightseeing. Rooms are clean, fully equipped, friendly and enthusiastic reception staff, arrived early and had a room available for early check-in! Very satisfied!

sample_comments.title: Beautiful, clean, cheap hotel in the center of Da Nang.
sample_comments.text: I really like the central location, close to Dragon Bridge, Con Market, the night pedestrian street, and the food street. There are many delicious restaurants nearby. The hotel is clean, and the rooms are well-equipped. The reception staff is enthusiastic, and they offer good motorcycle rentals. I am very satisfied and will visit again when I have the chance.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful hotel, conveniently located in the city center, with many good restaurants.
sample_comments.text: The hotel is located right in the center of Da Nang city, very convenient for travel and sightseeing. There are many delicious restaurants around. An ideal location for those who want to explore Da Nang's cuisine and enjoy the vibrant atmosphere of the city. The rooms are beautiful and clean, and especially the reception staff is very enthusiastic!

sample_comments.title: Clean room, central location, super friendly staff.
sample_comments.text: The hotel is located in the most central street of Da Nang, just a few minutes to the Dragon Bridge and Han River, and also close to the airport. The rooms are clean, and the reception staff are very nice and friendly!

sample_comments.title: Above all, wonderful.
sample_comments.text: The hotel is located in a very central area, surrounded by many good and reasonably priced restaurants. It is near Dragon Bridge, Con Market, and Han Market, making it very convenient for sightseeing and experiencing local cuisine. The room is clean, beautiful, and fully equipped with amenities. It's definitely worth staying when visiting Da Nang.

sample_comments.title: Great hotel!
sample_comments.text: I am very satisfied with the quality of the hotel: the location is very central, near Dragon Bridge, Con Market, and there are many delicious restaurants and nice chill coffee shops around! The room is clean, neat, and fully furnished. The reception staff is very friendly and enthusiastic, guiding me on renting a motorbike and booking tours very well. I will come back to Orange again if I have the chance.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful hotel, located in the most central street of Da Nang.
sample_comments.text: Charming hotel, fully equipped and clean rooms, very friendly reception staff, always ready to help when needed. Located in the most central street of Da Nang, close to Con Market, Han Market, Dragon Bridge, and surrounded by many delicious eateries! If you are traveling to Da Nang and need a central, affordable location, Orange is a great choice!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Great location, friendly staff, clean and comfortable rooms! I had a very satisfying experience staying at Orange Hotel. The location is very convenient, right in the city center, just a few minutes' walk to Dragon Bridge and Con Market. There are also many delicious restaurants and beautiful cafes nearby, making it easy to explore local cuisine. The hotel staff are very warm, friendly, and always ready to help. I felt very comfortable, as if I were at home. The rooms are clean, airy, and well-equipped. It is definitely worth choosing if you are looking for a convenient, clean, and good service accommodation in Da Nang!

sample_comments.title: Five star service in a 4 star hotel
sample_comments.text: Helpful welcoming staff greeted me with a lemonade. Good advice on guides. Fantastic breakfast buffet. The room itself is thoroughly updated and comfortable.
sample_comments.response:

sample_comments.title: Very nice hotel with very nice rooms and an extraordinary great staff
sample_comments.text:
I stayed in this hotel 2 nights while travelling Vietnam and it was just great. The hotel itself and its rooms are very clean and in a very good condition but the thing that makes this hotel really great is its staff.

All the people from the hotel are so nice and friendly and always do there very best to take care about you. It actually feels more like staying with friends.

I have stayed in so many hotels over the years but I cannot remember another hotel with such great employees.

So I absolutely recommend this hotel if you going to stay in Da Nang.
sample_comments.response:

It is so wonderful to hear that you are looking to join us again and we very much look forward to welcoming you back to your Da Nang home very soon.

Wishing you all the best for the New Year.

Kindest Regards,

Orange Team

sample_comments.title: Perfect for our needs
sample_comments.text: Lovely staff, friendly, polite and efficient. The room and bathroom were clean and well cared for. The restaurant was beautifully set out and breakfast was cooked to order and was delicious. We had a good view over the town while we ate. We chose the hotel for an overnight stop before a flight, as it was a short drive from the airport, but just a short walk from the river for an evening stroll and dinner. I wish we could have stayed longer.
sample_comments.response: Dear Christine i, Thank you very much for taking your time to review your recent stay with us. We really appreciate your feedback and kind words. I am very pleased to see that you enjoyed your time with us and that my owner and my team was so helpful during your stay. We look forward to welcoming you back at Orange Hotel in the very near future. Once again thank you for your great feedback. Best Wishes, Orange Team

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text:
As always Orange hotel is the best. I have stayed here many times, from when they first opened until the present. Do not know how they do it but the staff is always the best. One would think you would find a bad apple in the bunch that did not treat the guest like royalty. But from the moment you arrive streetside until your transplantation takes you away they are there just being the greatest. Most hotels look a little worn and tattered in no time in Vietnam. Not at the Orange Hotel... the factories do not look much different than the day they opened. 
 I have always been curious what their children's names were. I am sure one of them must be named Juice. Mr. Cam the owner means Orange in Vietnamese and his wife's Vietnamese name mean " Fresh" . Only stands to reason the family would stay with the fruit theme " Fresh , Orange, Juice"!!!! Keep up the great work guys. And keep the lights on for my return.
sample_comments.response: Dear Mr Timmy, It was such a pleasure to have you staying with us and I am thrilled to read of what an enjoyable stay you have had. I am delighted that you thoroughly enjoyed every aspect of your stay with us. It gives me great pleasure to read your kind words on our friendly and attentive staff across the hotel. Your kind comments are much appreciated and shall be passed on to my team. The service we provide really is a genuine pleasure for us though naturally it is reassuring and very encouraging to receive such feedback. I very much hope to welcome you back to the Orange Hotel in the near future and would like to thank you for taking the time to review the hotel . Warm regards, Orange Team

sample_comments.title: Amazing!!!
sample_comments.text: This was my second stay at Orange Hotel and it remains my absolute favorite hotel in Da Nang. The staff are so wonderful! My brother became sick and while I was out of the hotel, they brought rice porridge and ginger tea to his room. They also accommodated a late check out for him since he was too ill to travel. Thank you so much for another wonderful stay at Orange Hotel!!!!
sample_comments.response: Dear Ms Anne, Thank you so very much for taking the time to review Orange Hotel . It was such a pleasure to have you staying with us and I am thrilled to read of what an enjoyable stay you had. Thank you for your kind words and compliments toward all staff. I very much hope to have the pleasure to welcome you back in the near future and rather hope that you shall regard the Orange Hotel as your Da Nang home. Once again, thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience with other Agoda users. Warm regards, Orange Team

sample_comments.text: This was a wonderful hotel. I was very happy with my stay here. The staff was friendly and helpful. My room was beautiful, clean, comfortable and modern.

sample_comments.title: Its a gem!
sample_comments.text: I can't say enough good things about this hotel and the hospitality here. The hotel is in a great location, modern and clean. But what sets it apart is the outstanding service - better than we've ever had anywhere in Asia (the past 4 years). They put great effort into making sure you are well taken care of from the minute you check in until you leave. They really go above and beyond here. We had an opportunity to chat with the owner as well and he was a super friendly and provided a lot of good information about Vietnam. Highly recommend - you will not be disappointed!

sample_comments.title: Orange Hotel is a find
sample_comments.text: Orange Hotel is well-located just a few blocks from the Dragon Bridge and many restaurant choices. Mr. Cam is a hands-on owner and eager to make sure your stay is comfortable. He and his staff are friendly and very accommodating. The hotel is nice -- more modest and personal than some of the huge newer ones. Room rates were quite reasonable and a good value for the money. I would definitely stay here again.

sample_comments.title: Awesome hotel

They reply my email very fast and give me the information that I want. TQ Ms Lien.Room are clean and breakfast was great. The owner Mr Cam came great us during breakfast time ,Very kind and nice person that I meet.TQ Mr Cam.I will sure come back to Orange hotel again when I visit Danang Vietnam.

sample_comments.text: Breakfast variety could be better. However, overall all the staff are very helpful and friendly. Location of the hotel from point to point is very near.

sample_comments.title: Awesome hotel!
sample_comments.text: Loved our three nights here! We came to the Orange Hotel on recommendation from family members who had been before and it did not dissapoint! Thr staff is very friendly and helpful. The rooms are beautiful- very clean and modern. Super comfortable stay and great location!

sample_comments.title: Great hotel, super staff.
sample_comments.text: We have stayed in over 100 hotels in the past 6 months. None were better. None of the ones as good were as cheap. Friendly staff, great breakfast. Free water is expected, but free beer as well is great! WE were cycling and they very kindly asked us if we would like to take anything extra from breakfast to help us cycle. Great approach. Good room, but the staff made it.
sample_comments.positives: Super helpfull staff, great hotel, good breakfast.

sample_comments.title: Staff was wonderful. Helpful and hospitable
sample_comments.text: Breakfast was good--lots of choices.

sample_comments.title: Faboulous staff in great hotel
sample_comments.text: The hotel is new, well kept , with the lift. There is a wonderful large panoramic roof-top room for breakfast, with the best ever choice we had in out trip through Vietnam: hot and cold, sweet and savoury, plenty of fruits and all you could wish for. Our room was immaculately clean, with a very nice large modern shower. Our room wasn't very large but was comfortable (we only laked room to place our suitcases, so we left them on the ground. Really the only thing that could have been better, but there must be larger rooms). The staff deserves to be mentionned, as it has been extremely nice and helpful all the time, talking to the taxi driver to be sure he understood where he had to go, and trying to be helpful in every way they could.

sample_comments.title: The Best Possible Stay
sample_comments.text: This hotel was one of the most comfortable, clean, and friendly hotels in which my husband and I have stayed in our travels throughout Asia. The room was immaculately clean, the bed was "just right" for anyone with back issues, and the bathroom spotless. The shower always had hot water and didn't "cycle" hot and cold as some do. The staff was more than professional and friendly, always inquiring about our needs, making helpful suggestions for sights and shopping, and smoothing the way for us throughout our stay. We felt part of the "Orange Hotel family" and will stay there again without a doubt. We hope others have the same experience although we would like to keep this our "secret" spot!
sample_comments.positives: Professionalism of the staff, comfort and cleanliness of the room, ever hanging breakfast choices

sample_comments.title: Best Hotel in Danang
sample_comments.text: From the minute you walk in, the staff makes you feel very welcomed. During check in, they asked me to sit down at the sofa while they process my check in. During that time, they gave me a map the surrounding area and some places of interest nearby. I was also provided with complimentary drink and cold towel. The receptionist then came to us and gave us the room key and explained some stuffs. That was great as we did not have to stand at the counter awkwardly while the staff process out check in. The staff was genuine and did not push to sell tour packages available at the hotel. The rooms were clean and big. Bed was very comfortable but the point I would like to highlight would be the excellent service. The staffs were friendly and helpful. Everyone was so willing to recommend places to visit in Danang, even the restaurant staff. Even when I return to the hotel after a long day, the receptionist would give out cold towels which were very welcoming since the weather outside was so hot. They will also take the effort to ask how my day was and the places we had visited. All these added the personal touch that is absent in many 4 or even 5 star hotels. It is this kind of people working at this hotel that have really made the hotel a great place to stay. I do hope that they will be able to keep up their customer service.

sample_comments.title: Impressive and totally enjoyable
sample_comments.text: It was a throroughly enjoyable stay. The hotel is reasonably new, clean, and comfortable, and its facilities are all in the best of condition. The personnel - owner, sales manager, receptionists, restaurant staff, and van drivers - were all very friendly and respectful, which provided a very positive human element to the stay; they enjoyed engaging me (and other customers) in conversation and seemed genuinely interested in whatever was being discussed. The restaurant offered a variety of tasty dishes and drinks (including the Vietnamese style of coffee with condensed milk), and has some good views of the city. Orange is a hotel which can be highly recommended for travellers wanting to stay in central Da Nang.
sample_comments.positives: The staff (in the lobby, in the restaurant, in the office, and in the vehicle); the room; and the restaurant

sample_comments.title: First-class experience
sample_comments.text: It was an excellent stay. The room was very comfortable, clean, and well maintained; the staff were extremely friendly and helpful; and the meals and coffee in the restaurant were first-class. The views of the city from the restaurant windows are also very good. I would absolutely recommend Orange Hotel to travellers in Da Nang.
sample_comments.positives: The personnel (owner, sales manager, receptionists, restaurant staff, drivers); the room; the food.

sample_comments.title: The best hotel ever
sample_comments.text: I asked the sales team to arrange transportation or guided tours. Their informative and prompt reply was tailor made. The price was very reasonable. The hotel was opened only half a year ago. The rooms were tastefully decorated. So don't be fooled by the simple look of the lobby.
sample_comments.positives: Staff gave you true hospitality. They would see to your every need. I talked to people from London. We all agreed that the service was ridiculously good.

This hotel was the best customer service I have ever stayed at, equalling the Sheraton and the hyatt! The owner has a fantastic sense of humour and makes you feel at ease immediately. I honestly could not recommend this hotel more highly and literally tell everyone I meet how good it was! Thank you so much for making my stay in Vietnam a most truly enjoyable experience!!!!

sample_comments.title: Superb
sample_comments.text: This has to be one of the best hotels we stayed during our 1 month holiday around Vietnam & Cambodia. The rooms were spotless and a great breakfast was available in a dining room on top floor with views of the city. However, the one thing that stood out was how friendly and very helpful the staff were - thank you for making our stay memorable.

sample_comments.title: Great
sample_comments.text: The Orange Hotel is a great place to stay with a prime location in Da Nang close to the major attractions and the air port The staff are very friendly and efficient. The breakfast buffet is excellent. The only thing I disliked about my room was the transparent glass door in the bathroom right in front of the toilet. Who in their right mind would design such a bathroom door?
sample_comments.positives: Central location, nice room, computer terminal in room with Internet access

sample_comments.title: Inspirational and exceptional
sample_comments.text: When you bear in mind there are resort hotels in Da Nang charging up to $1,000 per night this seemed incredible when we secured a room for $50. How could they compete? Well, they DO! Price does not reflect in the quality and service what-so-ever and this hotel's got everything. We were lucky enough to meet the whole family and heard stories of inspiration from the father who started his career as a motor-cycle repair shop and worked every hour available to build up his "empire". His son works his socks off to make sure everyone is beyond happy. It simply is remarkable, inspirational and exceptional. Don't hesitate. You'll love it.

secondary.description_full:
Khám Phá Khách Sạn Orange - Trải Nghiệm Tiện Nghi Tại Trung Tâm Đà Nẵng

Nằm ngay trung tâm thành phố Đà Nẵng, Khách sạn Orange mang đến cho du khách trải nghiệm lưu trú tiện nghi và thoải mái chỉ cách trung tâm thành phố chưa đầy 0,5 km. Với thời gian di chuyển đến sân bay chỉ khoảng 5 phút, khách hàng dễ dàng kết nối và khám phá các điểm tham quan nổi bật của thành phố xinh đẹp này. Khách sạn được xây dựng từ năm 2013, đã có nhiều năm phục vụ du khách với dịch vụ chất lượng cao cùng không gian ấm cúng, thân thiện.

Với tổng cộng 42 phòng nghỉ hiện đại, Khách sạn Orange cam kết mang đến sự tiện nghi tối đa cho khách lưu trú. Thời gian nhận phòng bắt đầu từ 14:00 và trả phòng đến 12:00 trưa hôm sau, phù hợp cho các chuyến đi công tác hoặc du lịch dài ngày. Đặc biệt, khách sạn còn có chính sách thân thiện với gia đình, cho phép trẻ em từ 2 đến 5 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí, giúp các gia đình có thể tiết kiệm hơn trong chuyến hành trình của mình.

Tiện Nghi Giải Trí Đẳng Cấp Tại Khách sạn Orange Đà Nẵng

Khách sạn Orange tự hào mang đến cho khách lưu trú những trải nghiệm giải trí đẳng cấp và thư giãn tuyệt vời. Quý khách có thể thư giãn tại quầy bar sang trọng, nơi phục vụ các loại đồ uống đa dạng và sáng tạo, lý tưởng để thưởng thức sau một ngày khám phá thành phố năng động. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn cung cấp dịch vụ massage và spa chuyên nghiệp, giúp bạn xua tan mệt mỏi, lấy lại năng lượng để tiếp tục hành trình khám phá Đà Nẵng.

Tiện Nghi Tiện Lợi Tại Khách Sạn Orange Đà Nẵng

Khách sạn Orange Đà Nẵng mang đến cho khách lưu trú những tiện ích đa dạng và tiện lợi để chuyến đi của bạn thêm phần thoải mái. Với dịch vụ giặt ủi và giặt khô, bạn có thể dễ dàng duy trì trang phục sạch sẽ mà không cần lo lắng về thời gian hay công sức. Dịch vụ phòng 24/7 đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu ăn uống và thư giãn ngay tại phòng, mang lại sự tiện nghi tối đa cho khách. Để đảm bảo an toàn, khách có thể sử dụng két an toàn trong phòng, trong khi đội ngũ nhân viên hỗ trợ concierge luôn sẵn sàng giúp đỡ bạn với các yêu cầu đặc biệt hoặc hướng dẫn du lịch.

Đặc biệt, đội ngũ nhân viên của khách sạn thể hiện sự chuyên nghiệp và thân thiện, luôn sẵn sàng hỗ trợ để mang lại trải nghiệm tốt nhất. Với các yếu tố như vệ sinh sạch sẽ, thực phẩm ngon miệng và dịch vụ khách hàng tận tâm, Khách sạn Orange là lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những ai muốn có một kỳ nghỉ thoải mái, tiện nghi tại thành phố Đà Nẵng.

Đỗ xe và Wi-Fi luôn miễn phí, vì vậy quý khách có thể giữ liên lạc, đến và đi tùy ý. Nằm ở vị trí chiến lược tại Hải Châu, cho phép quý khách lui tới và gần với các điểm thu hút và tham quan địa phương. Được xếp hạng 3 sao, chỗ nghỉ chất lượng cao này cho phép khách nghỉ sử dụng mát-xa, xông khô và spa ngay trong khuôn viên.
